description: Field migrations that bring site content up to the current engine spec. Each entry describes a field whose canonical shape changed but which the engine still renders via a back-compat shim (so existing sites never break) — a site can be migrated forward when convenient. Consumed by the control plane (labels block-drift as a recognised 'migrate to X' instead of unknown-field noise) and by the bring-up-to-spec tooling (auto-applies the transform, verified pixel-identical by the A/B lookbook). Add an entry whenever a field's canonical shape changes and a shim keeps the old one rendering.

migrations.note: Flat label/href pair folded into the cta { label, link:{url} } group (resolveButton back-compat).
migrations.label: label

migrations.note: Second flat button on ctaBox → the cta2 group.
migrations.label: label2

migrations.note: Header-style blocks used ctaLabel/ctaHref before the cta group.
migrations.label: ctaLabel

migrations.note: FAQ aside button; the href arrived as either asideHref or asideCtaHref.
migrations.label: asideCtaLabel
